comment: "I commend the authors of this course for their exemplary work in designing and delivering content that is both comprehensive and engaging. The clarity of explanations and practical relevance reflect a high standard of academic and professional excellence."

"I found the practical, real-world examples and case studies particularly engaging, as they helped connect the theory to actual clinical scenarios. The interactive discussions and clear explanations from the instructor made the learning experience dynamic and memorable."
"This is very informative and helpful when handing over reports to my fellow colleagues. I will share this with them."
"I have learned a lot and gained more knowledge."
"I liked the step by step presentations of the concepts around clinical hand over and more so around the ISBAR3."
"Clear and precise power point is essential in patient care."
